programs.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
programs.desc: During the Civil War, a daring prison break frees hundreds of Union soldiers. When he was captured and sent to Libby Prison in Richmond, Virginia, he engineered one of the greatest mass escapes in history.

programs.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
programs.desc: In July 1996, one of the worst aviation disasters in American history leaves 230 people dead and countless questions unanswered. It's a tragedy that changes the aviation industry forever.

programs.title: Ancient Aliens
programs.desc: Puma Punku in Bolivia features some of the largest stone blocks on Earth, each carved with incredible precision. Could new technology solve an old puzzle-and offer proof of alien intervention on Earth.

programs.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programs.desc: Beneath the earth, and hidden in the depths of the sea, lie some of the deadliest discoveries of all time. From an asteroid impact that nearly ended life on Earth to creatures once thought to be myths.

programs.title: Lost U-Boats Of Wwii
programs.desc: Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos and his team make a discovery far older than they expected. Later, new evidence emerges suggesting that the team may have uncovered a long-lost battle at Target 4.

programs.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid
programs.desc: Archaeologists have spent centuries searching for the locations of holy births, deaths, miracles, and wars. In this episode, we explore the stories behind these lost sites and the endeavours to find them.
